summary: ESS Mobile API testing complete - All 32 tests passed. Fixed route ordering issues for /payslips/years and /documents/requirements endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed route ordering in /app/ess/api/routes/payslips.py - moved /payslips/years before /payslips/{payslip_id}
Fixed route ordering in /app/ess/api/routes/documents.py - moved /documents/requirements before /documents/{document_id}
FCM and APNS push notification delivery is MOCKED - no actual push sent without FCM_SERVER_KEY/APNS credentials
seed_data_creation: Leave applications created during testing (future dates)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ESS Mobile API fully tested on port 8002. All endpoints working: health check, auth (login/logout/refresh/session), profile (basic/bank/salary/attendance), leave (balance/history/apply/cancel), notifications (list/settings/read), payslips (list/years), documents (list/requirements). Single device policy verified working - new login invalidates old sessions. Main CRM API on port 8001 still working alongside ESS API.

authentication.login_ceo: PASS - CEO user can login with device registration
authentication.single_device_policy: PASS - New login invalidates old session

profile.get_profile: PASS - Returns employee profile with all fields

leave_management.get_balance: PASS - Leave balance returns casual/sick/earned leaves
leave_management.apply_leave: PASS - Leave application creates pending request
leave_management.past_date_validation: PASS - Past date leave rejected with 400

notifications.unread_count: PASS - Returns unread count for badge
notifications.update_settings: PASS - Can update quiet hours settings
notifications.mark_read: PASS - Can mark notifications as read

payslips.get_available_years: PASS - Returns years with payslips (fixed route ordering)

documents.get_requirements: PASS - Returns document requirements checklist (fixed route ordering)

main_crm_api.root_endpoint: PASS - Main CRM API still working at /api/
main_crm_api.login: PASS - Main CRM login still working

mocked_apis.FCM_push_notifications: MOCKED - No actual push sent without FCM_SERVER_KEY
mocked_apis.APNS_push_notifications: MOCKED - No actual push sent without APNS credentials
